channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.9%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer biographer warns Labour risks ‘real chance’ of changing leaders again before election if it ousts him now
item.description: Starmer biographer warns Labour risks ‘real chance’ of changing leaders again before election if it ousts him now

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: You can just about see a pathway to Burnham getting in. A backroom deal with Starmer to prevent Streeting getting the necessary signatures. A newly critical NEC setting a long timetable on the leadership contest. But...
item.description: You can just about see a pathway to Burnham getting in. A backroom deal with Starmer to prevent Streeting getting the necessary signatures. A newly critical NEC setting a long timetable on the leadership contest. But...

item.title: Novara Media: CONFIRMED: Wes Streeting Is Making His Move
item.description: CONFIRMED: Wes Streeting Is Making His Move

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting: PM-in-waiting or ‘this generation’s David Miliband’?
item.description: Wes Streeting: PM-in-waiting or ‘this generation’s David Miliband’?

item.title: The Guardian: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian
item.description: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian

item.title: ITVX: Starmer allies try to shore up support in anticipation of leadership challenge | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Starmer allies try to shore up support in anticipation of leadership challenge | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting plans to resign and mount leadership challenge, allies say - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting plans to resign and mount leadership challenge, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Keir Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech
item.description: Keir Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected
item.description: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer hopes to save his job with promise of change - and warnings of chaos
item.description: Starmer hopes to save his job with promise of change - and warnings of chaos
